summary: DPA page successfully renders with correct diner palette, typography, and content structure. All required elements are present including back link, heading, effective date, section content, and support contact. Minor typography weight could be improved but core contracts are met.

violations.description: Main 'Data Processing Addendum' heading appears to use bold weight rather than the required black weight (font-black, 900) specified for primary public headings

actions: Consider increasing the main heading font-weight to font-black (900) to fully align with diner typography standards
Verify section heading hierarchy follows the established pattern for legal content
